form.formComment: Last start finished 7th on March 25 over 520m at this track behind Zipping Violet beaten 16 lengths (30.63) in a Grade 5. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 7th on March 25 over 520m at this track behind Zipping Violet beaten 16 lengths (30.63) in a Grade 5. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels at the end of the back straight and lost momentum.
Passing the catching pen hampered and came together.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 30.23 over 520m at this track. Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth over 520m at this track, beaten 5 lengths (30.01) behind Zipping Zeppelin in a Grade 4/5 on March 29. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 520m at this track. Thereabouts last start but looks tested this time.

form.formComment: Good performance to post a big 4 lengths win at this track over 401m (22.75) beating Well Kept Secret in Grade 5 on April 1. Racing well and can win again.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 401m in 23.16. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 520m at this track at Grade 5 level. Happy enough to avoid.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (29.88) at this track over 520m. Has run slick time here with a 29.66 PB at the distance. Go close.
